allow: Bash(node -e "const{DatabaseSync}=require\(''node:sqlite''\);const db=new DatabaseSync\(require\(''os''\).homedir\(\)+''/.jarvis/crm.db''\);console.log\(''CRM contacts:'',db.prepare\(''SELECT name,company,stage,score FROM contacts''\).all\(\)\);db.close\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const{DatabaseSync}=require\(''node:sqlite''\);const db=new DatabaseSync\(require\(''os''\).homedir\(\)+''/.jarvis/knowledge.db''\);const docs=db.prepare\(''SELECT collection,title FROM documents''\).all\(\);const pbs=db.prepare\(''SELECT title,category FROM playbooks''\).all\(\);console.log\(''Knowledge docs:'',docs.length\);console.log\(''Playbooks:'',pbs.length\);console.log\(''Collections:'',JSON.stringify\([...new Set\(docs.map\(d=>d.collection\)\)]\)\);db.close\(\)")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f ""tokens=5"" %a in \(''netstat -ano ^| findstr :4242 ^| findstr LISTENING''\) do taskkill /PID %a /F")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f ""tokens=5"" %a in \(''''netstat -ano ^| findstr :4242 ^| findstr LISTENING''''\) do taskkill /PID %a /F")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4242 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Get-Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_-Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }")
Bash(curl -s -N -X POST http://localhost:4242/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""""message"""":""""Say hello in 5 words""""}' --max-time 30)
